Bin Shen Interview - Fashion Designer - Essex's Exhibition "Variation"时装设计师沈彬个人展览访谈-Essex变奏曲
snippet.description:
On March 4th and March 5th, 2023, my first solo fashion art exhibition: Essex  — Exhibition "Variation" was successfully held in my hometown in 1903 IN gallery, Kunming, Yunnan, China. 

This video is an interview from the organizers before the exhibition started, and it contains the following questions: 
1: How did you get into the sustainable fashion industry?

2: What does fashion and fashion design mean to you?

3: What is the biggest change and impact of AI on your daily work?

4: Why is the exhibition called "Variation"?

Hope you enjoy it, thank you!

在2023年3月4日和3月5日, 我在我的家乡中国云南昆明举办了第一个个人时尚艺术展览. 这个视频是在展览开始之前, 主办方对我的采访. 这个采访包含以下几个问题: 
1: 你是如何进入可持续时尚这个细分领域的？

2: 时尚，以及服装设计，对你来说意味着什么？

3: 人工智能对你的日常工作最大的改变和影响是什么？

4: 为什么这次展览叫“变奏曲”？

希望大家喜欢, 谢谢!

snippet.title: Shanghai bishop approved | Nicaraguan bishop back in prison | South Sudanese Cardinal
snippet.description:
Vatican-China Deal Broken?

On this week's debrief, Mike and Dominic return to discuss three bishops in the global Church: one from Asia, one from Latin America, and one from Africa.

Topics: 
1) Pope Francis officially appoints a bishop for Shanghai
2) Nicaraguan Bishop released, then returns to prison
3) A brief profile of a new African cardinal


Summary and Links:

1) On July 15, Pope Francis officially appointed Bishop Joseph Shen Bin as bishop of Shanghai. Back in April, Bishop Shen was installed in Shanghai without the approval of the Holy See. At the time, the Vatican strongly condemned this decision, a clear violation of the Vatican-China agreement on appointing bishops.

Why did the Vatican approve this appointment three months later?

Links:
- "Analysis: Why Pope Francis recognized a bishop appointed in violation of Vatican-China deal" | America Magazine | By Gerard O’Connell
https://www.americamagazine.org/faith/2023/07/17/vatican-china-bishop-shanghai-245694

- "Cardinal Parolin: Pope appoints Shanghai bishop for good of diocese and dialogue" | Vatican News
https://www.vaticannews.va/en/vatican-city/news/2023-07/cardinal-parolin-pope-appoints-shanghai-bishop-good-dialogue.html

2) Nicaraguan Catholic Bishop Rolando Alvarez was released from prison on July 4, but then returned to prison on July 5 after negotiations between Alvarez and the government broke down. Bishop Alvarez was sentenced to 26 years in prison back in February by Daniel Ortega’s government.

Why did Bishop Alvarez return to prison?

Links: 
- "Nicaragua: Bishop Álvarez sentenced to 26 years’ imprisonment" | Vatican News
https://www.vaticannews.va/en/church/news/2023-02/bishop-alvarez-sentenced-to-26-years-imprisonment.html

- "Nicaraguan Catholic Bishop Alvarez freed, talks going on" | Reuters
https://www.reuters.com/world/americas/nicaraguan-catholic-bishop-alvarez-released-prison-local-media-2023-07-05/

- "Nicaraguan Catholic bishop back to jail after talks stall, local media report" | Reuters
https://www.reuters.com/world/americas/nicaraguan-catholic-bishop-back-prison-after-talks-break-down-2023-07-05/

3) South Sudanese Archbishop Stephen Ameyu faced stiff resistance when he was appointed to the Archdiocese of Juba in late 2019.

Shortly after he was named archbishop, many in the archdiocese accused the archbishop of corruption, and of manipulating his way into the position — saying that he had influenced a Vatican diplomat and and even that he had fathered at least six children. Ameyu denied the allegations. 

In February of this year, Pope Francis visited South Sudan. 

By elevating him to the rank of cardinal, Francis seems to have reconfirmed his faith in his choice.

Links:
- "Pope Francis promotes Archbishop Stephen Ameyu to Cardinal" | Sudans Post
https://www.sudanspost.com/pope-francis-promotes-archbishop-stephen-ameyu-to-cardinal/

- "Meet Pope Francis’s new African cardinals" | Crux
https://cruxnow.com/church-in-africa/2023/07/meet-pope-franciss-new-african-cardinals

- "Archbishop of Juba’s heartfelt message to Pope Francis as he was returning to Rome" | Vatican News
https://www.vaticannews.va/en/africa/news/2023-02/archbishop-of-juba-s-heartfelt-message-to-pope-francis-as-he-was.html

ABOUT THE DEBRIEF
Intro Episode: https://youtu.be/LevSkGFqq4U
A weekly show where we dive deep into the news, topics, questions, and controversies facing the Catholic Church today. Hosted by Dominic de Souza, founder of SmartCatholics, posing questions to Mike Lewis, editor and cofounder of Where Peter Is. We bring you commentary, analysis, and context on tough questions that the Church is facing. Whether you’re a devout Catholic, a curious seeker, or just interested in the news and happenings in the Church, join us for The Debrief. When it comes to news and controversies in the Catholic Church, stay curious, informed, and engaged.

WHERE PETER IS
Visit Where Peter Is.com to read articles, commentaries, and spiritual reflections by and for faithful Catholics who support the mission and vision of Pope Francis. https://wherepeteris.com

SMARTCATHOLICS
The conversation is brought to you from SmartCatholics.com, the free online community for millennials, creators, and learners. Join our private WherePeterIs group to ask questions, share insights, and suggest topics for next time. https://smartcatholics.com

DONATE
Consider becoming a Patreon sponsor for Where Peter Is. Your generosity will help us continue to bring valuable content to you and enhance the quality of this show. https://www.patreon.com/where_peter_is

snippet.title: Shaolin-Meister Shi Heng Yi – Wie schafft man es, loszulassen?
snippet.description:
Mein heutiger Gast ist Shi Heng Yi.
Shi Heng Yi ist Shaolin Kung Fu-Meister und Gründer des Shaolin Temple Europe in Otterberg bei Kaiserslautern. Gerade ist sein Buch “Shaolin Spirit - Meistere dein Leben” erschienen und ich habe es mit Begeisterung gelesen. Darin schildert Shi Heng Yi nicht nur seinen persönlichen Weg, sondern gibt Weisheiten der Shaolin-Tradition so weiter, dass sie in unserer westlichen Welt Anwendung finden. 

Ich wollte von ihm wissen, wie er seinen persönlichen Sinn im Leben definiert, was ihn antreibt und wie es ihn geprägt hat, bereits mit vier Jahren in die Shaolin-Tradition eingetaucht zu sein - aber auch, woher eigentlich die “Kunst” im Begriff “Kampfkunst” kommt. Wir haben über das Anhäufen und Loslassen gesprochen, über Angst und innere Stärke, es geht um Urvertrauen, Erfolg und um Freiheit.

WERBEPARTNER & RABATTE:
https://linktr.ee/hotelmatze

MEIN GAST:
https://shihengyi.online/

DINGE:
Shi Heng Yi “Shaolin Spirit” - https://thalia.de/shop/home/artikeldetails/A1068359729
Shaolin Temple Otterberg - https://shaolintemple.eu/
Sein Youtube Kanal - https://youtube.com/@ShiHengYiOnline

MITARBEIT:
Redaktion: Lena Rocholl
Mix & Schnitt: Maximilian Frisch

MEIN ZEUG:
💭 Mein Fragenset: https://beherzt.net/matze

🎙 Mein Podcast bei Spotify: https://spoti.fi/3avZc16

snippet.title: Hyo-Seop helping sejeong with her dress 😭 #businessproposal #kimsejeong #ahnhyoseop #sbsaward2022
snippet.description:
kdrama: Business Proposal 
Shin Ha-Ri (Kim Se-Jeong) is a single woman and works for a company. She has a male friend and she has held a crush on him for a long time, but she learns that her friend has a girlfriend. Shin Ha-Ri feels sad and decides to meet her friend Jin Young-Seo, who is a daughter of a chaebol family. Jin Young-Seo then asks Shin Ha-Ri to take her place in a blind date and even offers some money for her time. Shin Ha-Ri accepts her friend's offer. She goes out on the blind date as Jin Young-Seo, while having the intention to get rejected by her date. When she sees her blind date, Shin Ha-Ri is dumbfounded. Her blind date is Kang Tae-Moo (Ahn Hyo-Seop). He is the CEO of the company where she works.

Kang Tae-Moo is the CEO of a company that his grandfather founded. One day, his grandfather informed him of an upcoming blind date that he set up for him. Kang Tae-Moo is a workaholic and he is annoyed that his grandfather sets up blind dates for him. He decides to marry the next woman whom he meets at a blind date, so he won't be disturbed from his work anymore. That woman is Shin Ha-Ri, but pretending to be Jin Young-Seo.

On the following day, Shin Ha-Ri receives a phone call from Kang Tae-Moo. He asks her to marry him.]

FOLLOW FOR MORE KDRAMA REEL 🌸🌸 
#abusinessproposal #businessproposal #ahnhyoseop #kimsejeong #kdrama #kdrama2022 #japuanim

snippet.description:
#shorts

【Love Between Fairy and Devil】is trending on iQIYI with multiple subtitles. Watch more episodes with early access and premium experience ONLY on iQIYI APP and www.iq.com！
App: https://bit.ly/iQIYIapp2022
Website: https://bit.ly/iQIYIweb2022

Join membership for more exclusive titles and perks: https://bit.ly/JoinSuperKiwi! 

【Introduction】Love Between Fairy and Devil is a period Xianxia directed by Yi Zheng ("Young Blood"), starring Esther Yu ("A Writer's Odyssey"), Dylan Wang ("Phanta City"), with special appearances by Xu Haiqiao ("A Dream of Splendor"), Guo Xiaoting ("Chinese Paladin 3"), and Charles Lin ("Café. Waiting. Love"). This drama is adapted from the novel of the same name by Jiu Lu Fei Xiang, which focuses on the story of the angsty love between the arrogant big devil Dong Fang Qing Cang and the soft and cute little fairy Xiao Lan Hua. The goddess of the Pixin tribe was exterminated by the demon Dongfang Qingcang (played by Dylan Wang), and was reborn as a low-ranking fairy in the heavenly realm ten thousand years later. In order to gain freedom, Dongfang Qingcang has to sacrifice the soul of Xiao Lan Hua to lift the spell seal on his body. In the process, this devil who has broken his love and desperation falls in love with the gentle and lovely Xiao Lan Hua......

【Cast】Esther Yu, Dylan Wang, Joe, Cristy, Zhang Ling He, Lin Bo Rui, Hachi, Hong Xiao, ZhangChenxiao, Cheng Zi

snippet.title: Penn & Teller on David Blaine
snippet.description:
Click here for the FULL interview https://youtu.be/YRf8YTnqUfA 

This is a podcast interview of Penn & Teller, as they share their thoughts on David Blaine and other magicians. 

#davidblaine 

What did you think of this video titled Penn & Teller on David Blaine let us know in the comments below. 

Penn and Teller have expressed admiration for David Blaine's magic and performance style, while also acknowledging their differences in approach and philosophy.

In an interview with The Guardian in 2019, Penn Jillette praised David Blaine as "one of the most dedicated performers out there," noting his willingness to push the boundaries of what is possible in magic and his ability to engage audiences with his stunts and illusions.

However, Penn also noted that he and Teller have a different approach to magic than Blaine, who often emphasizes the mysterious and otherworldly aspects of the art form. Penn and Teller, on the other hand, tend to be more straightforward in their presentations and often reveal the secrets behind their tricks.

In a 2014 interview with The Telegraph, Teller expressed similar sentiments about David Blaine, describing him as "an amazing performer" but also noting that he and Penn have a different philosophy when it comes to magic. Teller explained that he and Penn see magic as a form of storytelling, and that they prioritize clarity and coherence in their performances over the mere appearance of mystery.

Despite these differences, Penn and Teller have often spoken respectfully of David Blaine and his contributions to the art of magic. They have also collaborated with him on occasion, such as when Blaine appeared on an episode of their television show, Penn & Teller: Fool Us, in 2017.

Penn and Teller, on the other hand, tend to be more straightforward in their presentations and often reveal the secrets behind their tricks.

In a 2014 interview with The Telegraph, Teller expressed similar sentiments about David Blaine, describing him as "an amazing performer" but also noting that he and Penn have a different philosophy when it comes to magic. Teller explained that he and Penn see magic as a form of storytelling, and that they prioritize clarity and coherence in their performances over the mere appearance of mystery.

Despite these differences, Penn and Teller have often spoken respectfully of David Blaine and his contributions to the art of magic. They have also collaborated with him on occasion, such as when Blaine appeared on an episode of their television show, Penn & Teller: Fool Us, in 2017.
